title: Ukrainian Fish Broth
description: A traditional Ukrainian dish featuring a bitter and silky broth made with cold water and bonito flakes, often consumed as a hangover cure. This recipe is FODMAP-friendly.
instructions: Rinse the cod fillets under cold water and cut them into large chunks.
In a large pot, combine the cod chunks, bonito flakes, cold water, carrots, celery, parsley, black pepper, and salt.
Bring the mixture to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Remove the pot from the heat and let it steep for 5 minutes.
Strain the broth through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl, discarding the solids.
Let the broth cool to room temperature, then refrigerate it until chilled.
Serve the broth cold, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
